raw_text: Accidentally placed an order and was shocked to see the cancellation window is only 10 seconds. That’s far too short and unfair for customers. Mistakes happen, and there should be a reasonable cancellation period or better support for accidental orders. Very frustrating experience.

"Very disappointing experience. My order was incomplete, but I was charged for all the items. Despite reporting the issue, I have not received my refund yet. Customer support has not resolved the problem satisfactorily. I expected better service from Blinkit.

Very poor service. I raise query for missing items and the executive said we are unable to redeliver the products and also unable to refund amount. I always face issues when the order is huge. Also the quality of products is very poor.

Service has let down. I reported missing items reported on 2nd July and still struggling to get the resolution. I was told to mail you. when I emailed you, along with video and details I was told I will get resolution in 24 to 48 hours. for a 10 min delivery item, I had to wait this long. than i get msg after i followed up again that since you could not validate my missing items, you will not refund and resend my Missing item. is that my problem? what about my money? why should I suffer?

Very disappointing experience with Blinkit. I ordered blueberries worth around ₹260–₹270, and the amount was deducted from my account, but the item was never delivered. Customer support informed me that the money would be refunded, but I still have not received the refund. This kind of service is unacceptable. Taking payment without delivering the product and then delaying the refund causes inconvenience and loss of trust. I expected better service from Blinkit. I hope this issue gets

Disappointing experience with wallet balance and customer support Please be cautious when adding money to the Blinkit wallet. I recently topped up my account, but the balance fails to appear during checkout when I try to place an order. Furthermore, the customer support is highly inadequate. I tried using the in-app help feature but did not get a proper resolution. I then reached out via email, and it has been three days without any response. I strongly advise against keeping funds in the buil

Received a pack of 10 Classmate Octane pens, but the red pen doesn't work at all. Tried getting help through the app, but it says "not validated." It’s unfair that customers have to pay for defective items because the chat support doesn't work properly.

I've had a generally good experience with Blinkit. The app is easy to use, deliveries are usually fast, and the product selection is good. Most orders arrive on time, and the convenience of getting groceries and essentials & prints delivered within minutes is a big advantage. Thank you so much Blinkit. 😊

alot of unnecessary charges plus very slow delivery and most of the time unavailable, no every time. One day I order something and it's being 1 hour but I still not received my order plus the payment had already done, it again and again saying 13 minutes more. It's soo frustrating.

Blinkit is a very useful online grocery delivery app. It delivers groceries, snacks, fruits, vegetables, medicines, and other daily essentials quickly. The app is easy to use, and the products are usually fresh and well-packed. The delivery is fast, and the customer service is helpful. Blinkit saves time and makes shopping convenient, especially when you need something urgently. Overall, it is a reliable and convenient delivery service.

UPI option not showing. * Reviewing again after the problem was solved. I really love blinkit, I use it more than my social media 😂. Love all the products, arrives on time and quickly. I don't have to keep waiting, no matter the weather. Delivery persons are really nice as well. The only thing I wish blinkit had was more of Amul ice cream options. Btw I'm reviewing this from Siliguri. My all time fav app, not even exaggerating. ❤️

I purchase something, in the morning it came to me, in a broken condition. it was too broken that I wonder why the delivery guy even picked it up from the store in the first place. Moreover when I tried to get it replaced, I have been waiting till evening but I have not received any replacement. I am assured that I will get my money back but now I will uninstall the app and never use it again

prices are high as compared to other apps. refund is given in form of vouchers which are not automatically added during payment process and you tend to forget those vouchers. was using this for several years but not using it anymore.

Worst app nd worst service. No customer support. Only chat and not allow customers to chat properly as the typing space is greyed out. Not returning the defective product. So advising others not to order anything from this app as other app provide better services and resolution of the customer queries.

They delivered a faulty product. The earphone was simply not working. When I tried to replace it, there was no Return/Replace option in my account. After struggling through the chatbot, I finally reached support, who kept demanding impossible proof. They asked for a slow-motion 360° video of the entire 1-meter cable in crystal-clear 4K quality, as if I were a professional videographer. I paid ₹210 (₹185 + ₹5 handling + ₹20 tip) and received neither a replacement nor a refund.

Worst experience with this app. I ordered one product but received a completely different item. When I complained, they refunded only the discounted amount and did not return the full amount I paid after applying the offer. This mistake was from their side, so customers should not suffer the loss. Very disappointing service.

I would not recommend Blinkit's document printing service for confidential documents. I uploaded sensitive files like my Aadhaar card, scorecard, and certificates, but the printout packet arrived already open and looked torn. This raised serious concerns about the security of my personal information and the possibility of a data leak. If you're printing confidential documents, use this service at your own risk until they improve their document handling and packaging security.

I am from Salem, Tamil Nadu. For the last one week, almost all payment methods in Blinkit have been unavailable. UPI (Google Pay, PhonePe, Paytm, Amazon Pay UPI), credit/debit cards, and other payment options show technical errors. Even though I have sufficient balance in Amazon Pay, the payment still fails. Because of this issue, I am unable to place any orders. Please check if this is a location-specific issue and resolve it as soon as possible. Very disappointing experience.

worst app ever . not any support I had buying many products from blinkit every alternate date I had order many products . today I had order a charging cable .. the cable was not working properly . I had raised a request for return. but no one is support for refund this product.. zepto and Instamart is better for shopping

I am extremely disappointed with Blinkit's customer support. I returned my COD order and was promised a refund of ₹1011 by 13 July 2026, but today is 15 July and I still haven't received it. The app only shows the same automated message again and again, with no option to speak to a real support agent. There is no proper update, no refund reference number, and no actual assistance. I expected much better service from Blinkit. Please resolve my refund issue as soon as possible because this experie
